---
title: "Site Selection Exercise"
author: "Jae Jung"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: 1
    code-fold: true
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 2
    embed-resources: true
execute: 
  freeze: true
editor: visual
---

# Packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
#install.packages("gt")
library(gt)
theme_set(theme_minimal())
```

# Huff's model

![](images/clipboard-3639382016.png)(Huff_model_formula.png){width="1000"}

# Scenario setup

```{r}
shopping_center <- c("University Park", "Old Town", "The Falls")
size <- c(1000000, 100000, 500000)
travel_distance <- c(3, 1, 5)
b <- c(2, 2, 2)

df <- tibble(shopping_center, size, travel_distance, b)

df
```

# Probability of shopping at a shopping center

```{r}
df <- df |>
  mutate(s_t_ratio = size / (travel_distance^b))

df <- df |>
  mutate(s_t_ratio_sum = sum(s_t_ratio))

df <- df |>
  mutate(probability = s_t_ratio / s_t_ratio_sum)


df |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = md(
      "**Probability of a University Student Shopping for Shoes in Shopping Centers**"
    ),
    subtitle = md("*Which shopping center is best to start shoes store in?*")
  ) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(size, s_t_ratio, s_t_ratio_sum), decimals = 0) |>
  fmt_percent(columns = probability, decimals = 0) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "size in square feet",
    locations = cells_body(columns = size)
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "travel distance in miles",
    locations = cells_body(columns = travel_distance, rows = 1:3)
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "b = exponent of travel distance",
    locations = cells_body(columns = b)
  )
```

# Estimated Sales from the University Students

::: callout-note
## Background Information

-   There are 20,000 students attending the university

-   Assume that students spend \$300 for shoes a year

-   How much sales can you get if you start your shoe store in the University Park shopping center?
:::

```{r}
df_sales <- df |>
  mutate(sales = probability * 20000 * 300)

df_sales |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Estimated Sales from Shoes Store at each Shopping Center**"),
    subtitle = md("*Which shopping center is best to start shoes store in?*")
  ) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(size, s_t_ratio, s_t_ratio_sum), decimals = 0) |>
  fmt_percent(columns = probability, decimals = 0) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "size in square feet",
    locations = cells_body(columns = size)
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "travel distance in miles",
    locations = cells_body(columns = travel_distance, rows = 1:3)
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "b = exponent of travel distance",
    locations = cells_body(columns = b)
  ) |>
  fmt_currency(columns = sales, decimals = 0) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "sales = probability * 20,000 students * $300/student",
    locations = cells_body(columns = sales)
  )
```

# Reference

-   Introduction to gt table, <https://gt.rstudio.com/articles/gt.html#a-walkthrough-of-the-gt-basics-with-a-simple-table>

-   Posit Cloud test drive for gt Table, <https://rstudio.cloud/project/779965>
